chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.278 of 2022 Sajid Ali Magsi Versus Sindh Industrial Trading Estate and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection/reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.2600/2022 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 13.05.2024 Mr. Mujtaba Sohail Raja, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, Advocate for Respondent No.3..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant has filed a statement along with an office order and submits that in pursuance of it he has been instructed not to press this appeal. The appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
